title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Tata Housing

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Tata Housing
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Housing are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
